commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=40344835a0354cbfe0c23ff986a6230b810a53d2)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opt-in Telegram path that accumulates tool/commentary progress while streaming is off and sends that progress as a separate durable message before the final answer, along with supporting CLI commentary plumbing, streaming config, docs, and tests.

PR surface: Source +265, Tests +352, Docs +1, Generated 0. Total +618 across 19 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows the PR implements stream-off persisted progress while the added docs say the option is progress-mode only and describe stream-off as suppressing progress chatter. The contributor’s Telegram proof also shows the intended stream-off behavior after the patch.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused automated repair can align the docs/config help with the implemented stream-off `persistProgress` behavior without choosing a new product direction.

target.title: feat(telegram): non-streaming tool+commentary progress accumulator
target.body:
## Summary

The **non-streaming** counterpart to `persistProgress`: when `streaming.mode` is **off**, nothing streams during a turn, so tool and commentary progress were lost entirely. This accumulates the commentary + tool-progress lines **silently** as the turn runs and delivers them as their **own message** — commentary first, then the tool lines — immediately **before** the final answer. The user gets the whole progress lane once, when the answer is ready.

What it does (with `streaming.mode: "off"` + `streaming.progress.persistProgress: true`):

- **Accumulate silently** — on `onItemEvent` (preamble/commentary) and `onToolStart`, append to a per-turn log gated on `persistProgress`. Nothing is sent mid-turn (stream is off).
- **Deliver as a set before the answer** — `emitPersistedProgressSet` flushes the accumulated lane as its own durable message ahead of the final answer, but only when there is **no live draft stream** (so the stream-on persist path in #89850 doesn't double-emit).
- **Run callbacks with the stream off** — progress callbacks are allowed to fire when source delivery is suppressed *and* `persistProgress` is set, so the accumulator actually runs in `mode:off`.
- **Guard-free commentary opt-in** — adds `resolveChannelStreamingProgressCommentaryEnabled`, which reads the `commentary` opt-in **without** the progress-mode guard. The public `resolveChannelStreamingProgressCommentary` keeps its `mode === "progress"` guard (live-draft behavior unchanged); only the stream-off accumulator uses the guard-free read.

## Tests

- `tsgo` clean
- `bot-message-dispatch.test.ts` — 103/104 pass; the one failure (`records streamed final replies into the prompt context cache`) is a pre-existing Windows `/tmp` store-roundtrip issue that reproduces on the unmodified base commit (it is green on Linux CI).

## Proof

Captured via a local recreation of the Mantis (telegram-desktop-proof) flow on crabbox, with `streaming.mode: "off"` + `persistProgress: true` (the `separate` streamkey). Bot DM, `claude-cli` backend, opus-4.8 / max thinking.

Nothing streams during the turn; at final-send the whole lane lands as **one set, commentary first, then the tool reads**, with the answer as a **separate message** below it:

![stream-off: commentary+tool lane accumulated as its own set, then the answer below](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anagnorisis2peripeteia/openclaw/proof/commentary-persist-v2/stream-off-accumulate.png)

Observed:

> 💭 I'll read each file and summarize it.
> 📖 Read … README.md
> 📖 Read … package.json
> 📖 Read … tsconfig.json
>
> *(separate message)* Here's a one-line summary of each: …

Motion (silent turn → the set + answer arrive together at the end): [recording](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anagnorisis2peripeteia/openclaw/proof/commentary-persist-v2/stream-off-accumulate.gif)

Gateway trace confirms the lane accumulated and emitted with no live stream: `emitSet persist=true hasStream=false logLen=4 streamMode=off` (1 commentary line + 3 tool lines).

## Stacking

Built on **#89850** (`streaming.progress.persistProgress`), which is built on **#89834** (claude-cli commentary producer) and **#90883** (commentary delivery + render). This branch is rebased on the current #89850 head, so its own diff is just the stream-off accumulator (`bot-message-dispatch.ts`) + the guard-free resolver (`streaming.ts`). **Merge #90883 → #89834 → #89850 first.**

## Issues

Part of the #87326 progress UX work.
target.author: anagnorisis2peripeteia

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
